title: SBA High-Margin Cleaning Business $718,200 Revenue | $315,425 SDE
supportTraining: Comprehensive training and transition support will be provided to ensure a smooth handoff.
description:
Highly profitable interior / exterior cleaning business generating $718,200 in 2025 revenue with $315,425 in SDE. Proven growth from ~$589,000 in 2023 to ~$641,000 in 2024, with continued upward momentum. Revenue is driven primarily by window cleaning (~70%), with the balance from gutter cleaning and power washing.

The business serves a predominantly residential base (~85%) with 70%+ repeat clientele, supported by a dominant local presence and a strong online reputation with consistent five-star reviews. Operations are lean, scalable, and efficient, utilizing a 1099 contractor model (5 full-time, 10 part-time) with labor tied directly to revenue, resulting in strong margins and minimal overhead. No rent expense. The business can be operated remotely through centralized scheduling from a phone and laptop.

Includes approximately $40,000 in equipment and inventory. Currently owner-operated with clear upside through systemization, crew expansion, and growth in commercial accounts (~15% currently). Seller has built a highly efficient operation over 12 years and will support a smooth transition.

Job records are well documented and available to fully support and substantiate performance during due diligence.

Priced at only $895,000 (SBA would support much higher). This is a strong deal relative to cash flow and is intentionally priced for a quick, clean transaction.

Both broker and seller are aligned on running a tight, controlled process. This opportunity is being offered to a serious buyer who is prepared to move decisively, stay fully engaged during diligence, and close without unnecessary delays. In exchange, this is an excellent entry point into a highly profitable, systemized business.

Buyer Requirements:
Minimum $170,000 proof of funds required to engage with seller
740+ credit score
Transferable business or operational experience required

This business has been reviewed by an SBA lending resource and is believed to be financeable with approximately 10% down
